provenance.subject: Social Science
provenance.chapterTitle: Key Elements of a Democratic Government

questions.text: In a democracy, the government is accountable to:
questions.explanation: In a democracy, the government is accountable to the people. Citizens can question government actions and participate in decision-making.

questions.text: Universal Adult Franchise means all adults have the right to vote.
questions.explanation: Universal Adult Franchise means all citizens above 18 years of age have the right to vote, regardless of caste, religion, gender, or education.

questions.text: What is the minimum voting age in India?
questions.explanation: The minimum voting age in India is 18 years. This was lowered from 21 to 18 by the 61st Constitutional Amendment Act, 1988.

questions.text: The ________ is responsible for implementing laws and running the country.
questions.explanation: The executive branch of government is responsible for implementing laws and policies. It includes the President, Prime Minister, and Council of Ministers.
